steps.title: Use the direct reason
steps.content: The text says some more recent pits were carved on top of older pits, and this led Waweru to think the game was played at the site for a long time. The layered pits show repeated use across time.

steps.title: Reject weaker observations
steps.content: Choice B notes that there were many rows, but that does not prove long-term use. Choice C only names the location, and Choice D adds a depth contrast not supported by the text. The answer is A.
